en_title: Avowed, The Outer Worlds, and Fallout: New Vegas Developer Obsidian Entertainment Reportedly Also at Risk of Closure Amid Xbox 'Reset'
cn_title: XBOX重组波及《宣誓》《天外世界》《辐射：新维加斯》开发商黑曜石
subtitle: 巨震未停
opus_summary: 据报道，黑曜石正与XBOX领导层谈判以避免关闭，相关工作室也可能被出售。微软称游戏投资总额不会减少，但正在重新评估资金去向。

paragraphs.en: Avowed and The Outer Worlds developer Obsidian is reportedly also at risk of closure amid Microsoft’s “reset” of the Xbox business.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，在微软对XBOX业务进行「重置」之际，《宣誓》和《天外世界》开发商黑曜石也面临关闭风险。

paragraphs.en: The Game Business listed the Microsoft-owned studio, which developed the much-loved Fallout: New Vegas, alongside State of Decay developer Undead Labs, Psychonauts developer Double Fine, Hellblade developer Ninja Theory, and South of Midnight developer Compulsion as currently negotiating with Xbox leadership to avoid closure. Separately, Marvel's Blade developer Arkane Lyon is also said to be under threat .
paragraphs.cn: The Game Business列出了一批目前正在与XBOX领导层谈判、试图避免关闭的工作室，其中包括这家微软旗下工作室。黑曜石曾开发备受喜爱的《辐射：新维加斯》，名单上还包括《腐烂国度》开发商Undead Labs、《脑航员》开发商Double Fine、《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory，以及《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion。另据称，《Marvel’s Blade》开发商Arkane Lyon也受到威胁。

paragraphs.en: These studios may be sold rather than closed as part of a process that may take some time. And even if the studios are spun off, they may not avoid layoffs. IGN has asked Microsoft for comment about the layoffs reports, but it has yet to respond.
paragraphs.cn: 这些工作室可能会被出售，而不是直接关闭，这个过程也可能需要一些时间。即便工作室被剥离出去，也未必能避免裁员。IGN已就裁员报道向微软寻求评论，但微软尚未回应。

paragraphs.en: Obsidian is without a new announced project after both Avowed and The Outer Worlds 2 failed to hit commercial targets . There were rumors that the developer was making another Avowed game, but The Outer Worlds 3 was said to be not in development. On a more positive note, Grounded 2 — yet another 2025 launch — was a hit. But of the three games Obsidian released last year, it had the shortest (and almost certainly the cheapest) development period by far.
paragraphs.cn: 在《宣誓》和《天外世界2》都未达到商业目标之后，黑曜石目前没有已公布的新项目。此前有传言称该开发商正在制作另一款《宣誓》游戏，但据称《天外世界3》并未开发。更积极的一面是，《禁闭求生2》这款同样在2025年推出的作品取得了成功。但在黑曜石去年推出的三款游戏中，它的开发周期是最短的，而且几乎肯定也是成本最低的。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft bought Obsidian alongside Wasteland developer inXile back in 2018. Since then it has released The Outer Worlds 1 and 2, Grounded 1 and 2, Pentiment, and Avowed. Just last week, Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer, who is still at Obsidian, told The 41st Precinct , that he had no idea if he'd get the chance to make a new Fallout game — because that would be a decision that would come from on high, as it did when he was tasked with making New Vegas.
paragraphs.cn: 微软在2018年收购了黑曜石，同时还收购了《废土》开发商inXile。此后，黑曜石推出了《天外世界》1代和2代、《禁闭求生》1代和2代、《Pentiment》以及《宣誓》。就在上周，仍在黑曜石任职的《辐射：新维加斯》总监Josh Sawyer告诉The 41st Precinct，他不知道自己是否还有机会制作新的《辐射》游戏，因为这将是上层做出的决定，正如当年他被指派制作《新维加斯》时那样。

paragraphs.en: “These are things that take place above my head, right?” Sawyer responded when asked if he thought Obsidian might be given the chance to make a Fallout sequel or remake or be involved in the franchise in any way again.
paragraphs.cn: 当被问到他是否认为黑曜石可能再次获得制作《辐射》续作或重制版、或以任何方式参与该系列的机会时，Sawyer回答：「这些事情发生在我头顶上方，对吧？」

paragraphs.en: “I'm just a director. I'm the studio design director, which is kind of an advisory position to the teams, and then I'm a game director. But there are titans above me who decide what happens with IPs and things like that. It's not up to me.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我只是一个总监。我是工作室设计总监，这对各团队来说算是一种顾问职位，然后我也是一名游戏总监。但在我上面还有决定IP和这类事情走向的巨人。这不由我决定。」

paragraphs.en: “So one day you'll just find out you've got to make a Fallout game?”, Sawyer was asked.
paragraphs.cn: 提问者问Sawyer：「所以有一天你就会突然发现自己必须做一款《辐射》游戏？」

paragraphs.en: “Well, it's how it happened with New Vegas, so who knows?” he replied.
paragraphs.cn: 他回答：「嗯，《新维加斯》当年就是这么发生的，所以谁知道呢？」

paragraphs.en: New Xbox boss Asha Sharma is reportedly speeding up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games, and some had thought that Obsidian might have been drafted in to make a new Fallout game as part of that, either a Fallout: New Vegas 2 or something else in the franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，XBOX新负责人Asha Sharma正在加快新《上古卷轴》《辐射》和《光环》游戏的开发，有些人曾认为黑曜石可能会因此被调去制作一款新的《辐射》游戏，无论是《辐射：新维加斯2》，还是系列中的其他作品。

paragraphs.en: "I know everyone on the internet, on every game we ever announce, will constantly reference back to, 'When's the next New Vegas?'" Obsidian's VP of operations Marcus Morgan said last year , referencing the studio's beloved Fallout game that's served as the inspiration for the hit Amazon TV series' second season setting.
paragraphs.cn: 黑曜石运营副总裁Marcus Morgan去年谈到这款备受喜爱的《辐射》游戏时说：「我知道互联网上的每个人，在我们宣布任何游戏时，都会不断回头提到『下一部《新维加斯》什么时候来？』」这款游戏也是亚马逊热门剧集第二季设定灵感的来源。

paragraphs.en: Sharma sent shockwaves through the video game industry with her now infamous “reset” memo, in which she revealed that Microsoft's gaming business has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin). "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma那封如今臭名昭著的「重置」备忘录震动了整个电子游戏行业。她在备忘录中透露，微软游戏业务的问责利润率为3%（外界认为这指的是利润率）。Sharma说：「不包括动视暴雪King，过去五年里，我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴的持续投资上花费超过200亿美元(约合人民币1360亿元)，但同期我们的年收入却下降了近5亿美元(约合人民币34亿元)。往后，这种情况不能继续。」

paragraphs.en: Bloomberg's Jason Schreier has warned of a “bloodbath” at Xbox . Meanwhile, Microsoft is reassessing its investment in externally developed games. It just pulled funding for IO Interactive’s upcoming fantasy project , which Xbox was set to publish. Hideo Kojima’s Xbox horror game OD, however, is safe from the chopping block .
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社的Jason Schreier警告称，XBOX将迎来一场「大血洗」。与此同时，微软正在重新评估其对外部开发游戏的投资。它刚刚撤回了对IO Interactive即将推出的奇幻项目的资助，而该项目原本将由XBOX发行。不过，小岛秀夫的XBOX恐怖游戏《OD》并不在砍刀之下。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft told Bloomberg it is “taking a fresh look at where we invest so we’re focusing on our highest priorities.”
paragraphs.cn: 微软告诉彭博社，公司正在「重新审视我们的投资方向，以便聚焦最高优先级」。

paragraphs.en: “We're not reducing our overall investment in games. We expect to invest about the same in content as we did last year. What's changing is where we're investing and the kinds of projects we're backing,” Microsoft said.
paragraphs.cn: 微软表示：「我们并没有减少对游戏的总体投资。我们预计今年在内容上的投入会与去年大致相同。正在改变的是我们投资的位置，以及我们支持的项目类型。」

paragraphs.en: The Information reported that Microsoft hadn't ruled out turning the Xbox brand into a wholly-owned subsidiary in a move that could result in Xbox being operated as a joint venture with other partners or even potentially sold.
paragraphs.cn: The Information报道称，微软尚未排除将XBOX品牌变成全资子公司的可能性，而这一举措可能导致XBOX以与其他合作伙伴成立合资企业的形式运营，甚至存在被出售的可能。

paragraphs.en: This week, unionized Xbox workers called for immediate bargaining following the layoff reports , hosting a press conference to say “we're done paying for executives' failures.” A Microsoft spokesperson told IGN it will continue to negotiate with the CWA to reach agreements across Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 本周，在裁员报道出现后，加入工会的XBOX员工呼吁立即展开谈判，并举行新闻发布会表示「我们受够了继续为高管的失败买单」。微软发言人告诉IGN，公司将继续与美国通信工人协会（CWA）谈判，以在整个XBOX范围内达成协议。

paragraphs.en: "We respect the right of our team members to make their voices heard," the spokesperson said. "We have a long track record of good faith partnership with labor organizations, as demonstrated by the several finalized bargaining agreements our teams have reached with the CWA and our labor principles. We are continuing to negotiate in good faith with the CWA to reach agreements across Xbox."
paragraphs.cn: 这位发言人说：「我们尊重团队成员发声的权利。我们与劳工组织有着长期的善意合作记录，我们的团队与CWA达成的数项最终谈判协议，以及我们的劳工原则，都证明了这一点。我们将继续本着善意与CWA谈判，以在整个XBOX范围内达成协议。」

paragraphs.en: Microsoft cut an eye-watering 9,000 staff in July 2025 in a company-wide round of layoffs that also hit gaming. A number of titles were canceled as part of those cuts, including Rare’s Everwild, and studios shut down, such as Perfect Dark developer The Initiative. Staff who remain at Xbox are now bracing themselves for a potential repeat situation just a year later.
paragraphs.cn: 微软在2025年7月进行了一轮全公司范围内的裁员，令人咋舌地裁掉9000名员工，游戏业务也受到冲击。多款游戏在那轮裁员中被取消，包括Rare的《Everwild》；也有工作室被关闭，例如《Perfect Dark》开发商The Initiative。仅仅一年后，留在XBOX的员工如今又在为可能重演的局面做准备。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他，也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
